title: Secretly rewritten nuclear safety rules are made public
description: The Energy Department made the rules public a month after NPR reported about their existence. The rules slash requirements for security and environmental protections.
content: The Energy Department made the rules public a month after NPR reported about their existence. The rules slash requirements for security and environmental protections.
